How it works

Your college search, simplified

🔍
01

Search & Filter

Browse colleges by state, type, fees, and rating. Find colleges that match your criteria.

📈
02

Predict & Compare

Enter your JEE rank to see which colleges you qualify for. Compare 2-3 colleges side by side.

✅
03

Save & Decide

Save your shortlisted colleges, read student reviews, and make an informed decision.

Ready to find your dream college?

Create a free account to save colleges, track comparisons, and get personalized recommendations.
